query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS overseas_projects (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId int NOT NULL,
  name varchar(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '未命名项目',
  market varchar(64),
  style varchar(128),
  synopsis text,
  characters text,
  scenes text,
  imageEngine varchar(64) DEFAULT 'gemini_3_pro_image',
  videoEngine_proj enum('seedance_1_5','seedance_2_0','veo_3_1','kling_3_0','kling_3_0_omni','runway_gen4','hailuo_2_3','grok_video_3','sora_2_pro','wan2_6') DEFAULT 'seedance_1_5',
  isDeleted boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
command:

  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId int NOT NULL,
  name varchar(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '未命名项目',
  market varchar(64),
  style varchar(128),
  synopsis text,
  characters text,
  scenes text,
  imageEngine varchar(64) DEFAULT 'gemini_3_pro_image',
  videoEngine_proj enum('seedance_1_5','seedance_2_0','veo_3_1','kling_3_0','kling_3_0_omni','runway_gen4','hailuo_2_3','grok_video_3','sora_2_pro','wan2_6') DEFAULT 'seedance_1_5',
  isDeleted boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
